parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ platform: $json.platform, severity: $json.severity, category: $json.category, entity_type: $json.entity_type, entity_id: $json.entity_id, entity_name: $json.entity_name, metric: $json.metric, current_value: $json.current_value, threshold_value: $json.threshold_value, account_id: $json.account_id, account_name: $json.account_name, message: $json.message, recommendation: $json.recommendation, is_resolved: false, date: $json.date }) }}
